task_completion.description: Open the Wayfinding EIR document on the desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer is open showing the contents of 'wayfinding_eir.txt' from the desktop.

task_completion.description: Create at least 4 IfcSign elements in the model
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender Outliner or BlenderBIM properties panel shows at least 4 distinct elements classified as 'IfcSign'.

task_completion.description: Create at least 2 distinct IfcSignType definitions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BlenderBIM Type Manager or Object Properties panel shows at least two different 'IfcSignType' definitions (e.g., one for emergency exits, one for room identification) assigned to the signs.

task_completion.description: Assign a custom property set named 'Pset_Signage' containing a 'SignText' property to each sign
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Object Properties > Object Information > Property Sets panel, a custom Pset named 'Pset_Signage' is visible and expanded, showing a property named 'SignText' with a text value.

task_completion.description: Ensure signs are spatially contained within the building storeys
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Blender Outliner (Spatial hierarchy view), the newly created IfcSign elements are nested under an IfcBuildingStorey element (e.g., Ground Floor, Level 1), rather than floating unassigned at the project root.
A save/export dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_wayfinding.ifc', or the Blender window title updates to reflect this new filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the BlenderBIM (Bonsai) graphical interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender menus, outliner, and BlenderBIM specific panels rather than executing a Python script in the terminal to generate the IFC file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created the custom property sets within the BIM environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Pset_Signage' and 'SignText' properties are visible within the BlenderBIM UI panels, not just typed into a separate text file or mocked.

integrity.description: The agent saved or exported the IFC file from Blender.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used Blender's 'Save Project' or 'Export IFC' functionality, rather than just renaming an existing file in the file manager.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating at least 4 'IfcSign' elements and at least 2 distinct 'IfcSignType' definitions in BlenderBIM (Bonsai). Each sign must have a custom property set named 'Pset_Signage' with a 'SignText' property. The signs must be spatially contained within building storeys (visible in the outliner hierarchy nested under an IfcBuildingStorey). The final model must be saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_wayfinding.ifc'. The reference document is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/wayfinding_eir.txt'.
